backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the ICP backend, providing user profile management, page content storage, pricing entries, and access control via role-based permissions, with blob storage mixin included.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed text changes in ContactPage.tsx: removing '– ganz ohne Kosten' from the 'Wichtig zu wissen' section and removing '– kostenlos' from the 'Termin buchen' section.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary file describing the purpose and recent changes of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/ic-assets.json: ICP asset configuration that ensures the .well-known directory is not ignored during deployment.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with German locale, SEO meta description for online couples coaching, and Plausible Analytics tracking for www.paarweg.com.
frontend/public/.well-known/ic-domains: ICP domain verification file listing paarweg.com and www.paarweg.com as the canonical domains for the canister.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing all public pages of www.paarweg.com including the homepage, location landing pages, service pages, and legal page with priorities and change frequencies.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that defines all TanStack Router routes, including main pages, admin tools, and three location-specific landing pages (Zurich, Basel, Swiss Online), wrapped with ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/admin/ThemeHexCo: Admin UI card component that displays runtime-computed HEX color values for the page background and primary CTA button, with copy-to-clipboard functionality for each color.
frontend/src/components/CalendlyInlineWi: Empty file placeholder for a Calendly inline widget component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Site-wide layout component providing sticky header with desktop and mobile navigation, special reload logic for the Kontakt page, instant scroll-to-top on route changes, and a footer with Basel headquarters info and attribution.
frontend/src/components/MobileReadMore.t: Mobile-only collapsible content component that truncates long text behind a 'Mehr anzeigen' toggle button with a gradient fade, controlled by a feature flag to enable or disable compacting.
frontend/src/config/featureFlags.ts: Centralized feature flags configuration file with a single flag to enable or disable mobile 'Read more / Show less' content compacting behavior, defaulting to false.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useComputedThemeHexCo: React hook that computes runtime HEX color values for the app's background and primary button by injecting temporary probe DOM elements and reading their computed styles, re-computing on dark mode class changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status, wrapped in a React context provider.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching hardcoded CSR metadata and generating a PKCS#10 certificate signing request (CSR) in the browser using the Web Crypto API with RSA-2048 keys.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that defines Tailwind base/component/utility layers and sets up a warm sand/terracotta light theme and a warm dark theme using CSS custom properties for all UI color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page for Roland Soder on the PaarWeg site, displaying his bio, credentials, and coaching philosophy with SEO meta tags, Open Graph tags, and a hero section with photo.
frontend/src/pages/BaselCouplesLandingPa: Landing page targeting couples in Basel for online couples counseling, featuring a video hero section, Google Ads tag injection scoped to this page, and relevant SEO/OG meta tags.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact and appointment booking page for PaarWeg, showing direct contact info (email, phone), a Calendly booking link, and an FAQ accordion, with SEO and Open Graph meta tags.
frontend/src/pages/CouplesPage.tsx: Service page describing couples coaching offerings for pairs in any relationship phase, with a hero section, feature cards, a collapsible mobile read-more component, and SEO/OG meta tags.
frontend/src/pages/CSRGeneratorPage.tsx: Admin/utility page that auto-generates an SSL Certificate Signing Request (CSR) on load using a backend mutation, then displays the CSR and public key with copy and download options.
frontend/src/pages/DomainVerificationPag: A diagnostic page that fetches `/.well-known/ic-domains` and displays whether the Internet Computer domain verification file is correctly configured for www.paarweg.com.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page for PaarWeg that sets SEO metadata (title, Open Graph, Twitter Card, JSON-LD structured data) and renders the hero section and feature cards for the coaching service.
frontend/src/pages/LegalPage.tsx: Displays the Impressum (legal notice) and Datenschutz (privacy policy) information for Roland Soder Coaching, including contact details, liability disclaimers, and copyright notices under Swiss law.
frontend/src/pages/MenPage.tsx: A coaching-for-men landing page that sets SEO/OG metadata and renders a hero section with descriptive copy, feature cards, and CTAs targeting men seeking relationship coaching.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Displays pricing information for PaarWeg coaching sessions (190 CHF / 90 min, free intro call) along with an FAQ accordion, and sets full SEO/OG/Twitter metadata for the pricing page.
frontend/src/pages/SitemapPage.tsx: Renders a human-readable XML sitemap listing all public PaarWeg URLs with priorities and change frequencies, intended for submission to Google Search Console.
frontend/src/pages/SwissOnlineCouplesLan: Landing page for Swiss online couples counseling (PaarWeg) with SEO meta tags, Open Graph tags, JSON-LD structured data, and a hero section featuring a video with play/mute controls.
frontend/src/pages/TechnicalStatusPage.t: Admin/diagnostic page that runs and displays status checks for DNS, SSL, WWW CNAME, 301 redirects, Plausible analytics, and domain resolution, along with a theme hex codes section.
frontend/src/pages/WomenPage.tsx: Landing page targeting women in relationships for PaarWeg coaching, with SEO/OG meta setup, a hero section with descriptive copy, and a collapsible mobile read-more component.
frontend/src/pages/ZurichCouplesLandingP: Zürich-specific couples counseling landing page that dynamically injects Google Analytics (gtag) scoped to this route, sets SEO/OG meta tags, and includes a hero video with play/mute controls.
frontend/src/types/calendly.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file, likely intended to provide type definitions for the Calendly embed library.
frontend/src/utils/color.ts: Utility module providing functions to convert CSS color strings (rgb, rgba, oklch, hex) into normalized uppercase HEX format, including an OKLCH-to-RGB conversion implementation.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, border radii, accordion animations, and enabling typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state for the PaarWeg website, recording two completed features that remove redundant cost-related phrases from ContactPage.tsx.
